title: halenia paucifolia
intro: Halenia paucifolia, also known as the 'few-leaved halenia', is a plant species that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating respiratory issues. Halenia paucifolia is typically prepared as a tea or decoction for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
